response.title: Senior Policy Analyst
response.description: The Senior Policy Analyst will be responsible for conducting in-depth research and analysis on government policies and legislative issues. The role will involve collaborating with stakeholders, preparing reports, and providing strategic recommendations to improve public policy outcomes. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in policy analysis, excellent communication skills, and the ability to navigate the complexities of government operations.

requirements.education: Master's degree in Public Policy, Political Science, or related field
